description: NinjaTrader 8 is open with daily OHLCV data for MSFT (Microsoft Corp.) from January 2023 to December 2024 available. As a quantitative trader, stress-test the 'SampleMACrossover' strategy by running a backtest for MSFT on a daily timeframe from 1/2/2023 to 12/29/2024. Configure the execution parameters with an order quantity of 500 and slippage of 2 ticks. Run the backtest and save the workspace to persist these settings.
